form.label: Anthropic TA - Operations
form.description: Operational health of the add-on: ingestion freshness, volumes, and input errors. Input-error panels read index=_internal and need an admin-capable role.

search.query: | tstats latest(_time) AS last WHERE `anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype=anthropic:* by sourcetype | eval lag_minutes=round((now()-last)/60,1) | eval last=strftime(last,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table sourcetype, last, lag_minutes | sort - lag_minutes
| tstats count WHERE `anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype=anthropic:* by _time span=1h, sourcetype | timechart span=1h sum(count) by sourcetype
`anthropic_claude_index` sourcetype="anthropic:compliance:activity" | stats count by ai.event_type | sort - count | head 15
index=_internal source=*ta-anthropic_claude_enterprise*.log* log_level=ERROR | stats count by source | sort - count
index=_internal source=*ta-anthropic_claude_enterprise*.log* log_level=ERROR | table _time, source, _raw | sort - _time | head 20
index=_internal source=*ta-anthropic_claude_enterprise*.log* ("Rate limited" OR "429" OR "AnthropicAPIError") | timechart span=1h count
